_comment: GPU perf: Firefox projects skip (metadata). Fill _budgets_basis and _heap_basis after 3 local perf runs and one heap run.
_budgets_basis: PENDING: set after 3× `pnpm --filter e2e test tests/perf_budgets.spec.ts` per project; use median(metrics) * 1.2 for TTFR and frame_time; see README.
_heap_basis: PENDING: set from diagnostics_heap heap1 (MiB) * 1.1 after one successful run; do not raise to mask leaks.
